canonical_boundary: CH09 AR Event Layer. Field experience and closure entry. No new lore. No Canon Gap fill.

asset_boundary.ar_event: Field visualization and approved closure entry; does not create 云门 state.
asset_boundary.relic: AR output may reference Relic context; Relic progression remains deterministic from exploration.
asset_boundary.rights: L1 redemption refs stay outside ritual closure chain.
asset_boundary.digital_collectible: Share outputs are user-initiated; zero Relic progression effect.

events.name: 未来场域
events.description: 记念场域·未来种子处的场域体验。未来之约是 L2 章节题名，不是新地理或可被占有的关卡。
events.copy: 预览未来场域，不请求 live AR 权限。
events.canonical_boundary: Future field visualization only; 未来之约 is L2 chapter title, not new geography.

events.name: 未来残印
events.description: 记念场域处探索记录的未来印迹显现。残印是连接曾经存在过的证据，不是收藏数量。
events.copy: 预览未来印迹粒子场域，不定义残印形成机制。
events.canonical_boundary: Does not define imprint formation mechanics; album H independent from prior chapters.

events.name: 集体回响
events.description: 记念回响镜·集体回响处的场域体验。影响开始在社会互动中被照见，共鸣在回响处被记存。
events.copy: 预览集体回响场域，承接第二处觉察。
events.canonical_boundary: Uses existing field context only; no new Cosmology or lore.

events.name: 连接延伸场域
events.description: 记念谷里咖啡·连接延伸处的场域体验。一次服务、一杯咖啡、一次真实相遇，善意连接仍可在真实相遇处被照见。
events.copy: 预览连接延伸场域；结缘礼在探索完成后于结缘商城触达。
events.canonical_boundary: L1 redemption stays outside ritual chain; no medical or lineage claims.

events.name: 社会影响引导
events.description: 记念云间书符·社会影响处的场域体验。修习是记念觉察被记存，不是获得新力量——符者，记念也，非咒也。
events.copy: 预览社会影响引导场域，不宣称医疗、派系或传承体系。
events.canonical_boundary: No medical claim, magic system, sect, or lineage; no L1 rights popup at practice node.

events.name: 未来之约·章成
events.description: 记念《未来之约》章成 closure 场域。五处觉察已齐备，世界留下未来印记，见证连接而非等级。
events.copy: 预览章成 closure 场域，可接续分享海报生成流程。
events.canonical_boundary: Completion is not ranking, level, combat, or proof of superiority.
